text.content:
♥ Fortitude

Level 1: Resilience

Cost: Free | Pool: -- | Type: Utility

Passive. Add your Fortitude rating as extra Health levels specifically for tracking Superficial damage. These bonus levels are lost first when taking damage. They regenerate at the start of each night. This effectively increases your ability to absorb punishment before being impaired.

Level 1: Unswayable Mind

Cost: Free | Pool: -- | Type: Utility

Passive. Add your Fortitude rating as bonus dice to resist all supernatural mental influence: Dominate, Presence, Dementation, and similar powers. This also applies to mundane persuasion enhanced by blood (Blood Bond influence). Does not protect against Auspex reading, only against powers that compel or alter your mental state.

Level 2: Toughness

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: -- | Type: Combat

Convert Aggravated damage from non-supernatural physical sources (falls, car crashes, gunfire, blades) to Superficial damage. Each point of Aggravated becomes 2 Superficial instead. Does not protect against fire, sunlight, or supernatural attacks. Lasts one scene. While active, you can shrug off impacts that would pulverize a mortal.

Level 2: Enduring Beasts

Cost: Free | Pool: -- | Type: Utility

Grant your ghouls and bonded animals (Famuli) Fortitude 1 (Resilience) permanently as long as they regularly receive your blood. They gain the bonus Health levels and general hardiness. If the blood bond lapses, the protection fades over one week. Useful for protecting mortal retainers and animal companions in dangerous situations.

Level 3: Defy Bane

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Wits + Fortitude | Type: Combat

Resist fire and sunlight — the two things that deal Aggravated damage to all vampires. When exposed, roll Wits + Fortitude (difficulty 3 for a torch, 4 for a bonfire, 5 for direct sunlight). Success converts the Aggravated damage to Superficial for that turn. Each turn of continued exposure requires a new roll. Also reduces Rotschreck difficulties by your Fortitude rating. Does not make you immune, but can mean the difference between Final Death and survival.

Level 3: Fortify the Inner Facade

Cost: Free | Pool: -- | Type: Utility

Mask your aura from Auspex. When someone attempts Scry the Soul on you, they read a false aura of your choosing — you can appear mortal, emotionless, or display any emotion you want. They receive no indication the aura is false unless they score a critical win, in which case they sense 'something is off.' Also protects against casual emotional reading. Lasts one night.

Level 4: Draught of Endurance

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: -- | Type: Utility

Feed a mortal or ghoul your blood to grant them Fortitude 1 (Resilience or Unswayable Mind, your choice) for one night. The recipient must drink directly from you. Only one recipient at a time. Useful for preparing mortal allies to survive dangerous confrontations or resist mental manipulation.

Level 5: Flesh of Marble

Cost: 2 Rouse | Pool: -- | Type: Combat

Your skin becomes supernaturally hard — visibly stone-like in texture. All physical damage (melee, firearms, falls) is halved before being applied. Aggravated physical damage is converted to Superficial. You become nearly immune to conventional weapons. Lasts one scene. Drawback: your Dexterity-based dice pools suffer a 2-dice penalty due to reduced flexibility, and your appearance is obviously inhuman. Fire and sunlight damage is unaffected.

Level 5: Prowess from Pain

Cost: Free | Pool: -- | Type: Combat

Passive. Each Health level of damage you have marked (both Superficial and Aggravated) adds 1 bonus die to your physical dice pools instead of penalizing you. The more hurt you are, the stronger you become. At the Impaired level, instead of halving your dice, you add your total damage as bonus dice. This does not prevent Final Death — it just means you fight hardest when closest to destruction.
